title: hieracium neocoracinum
intro: Hieracium neocoracinum, also known as a species of hawkweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antioxidant. Hieracium neocoracinum is typically prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and can be used topically to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne.
